pages.text: The $(item)Chorus Forest Skyseed$() — your own corner of the End highlands. Plant it for an end-stone island studded with $(item)chorus plants$() and veined with $(item)purpur$(), an $(item)enderman$() pack roaming it.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Bootstrap from the End's outer islands: harvest a wild $(item)chorus plant$() for $(item)chorus fruit$(), then ring it with $(item)end stone$(). After that it's renewable — your own chorus never runs out.

$(bold)The economy$()$(br)Chorus plants regrow, so the island is a renewable farm. $(item)Chorus fruit$() is teleport-food; smelt it to $(item)popped chorus fruit$() → $(item)purpur$() blocks, pillars, stairs and slabs. And the resident $(item)endermen$() are a steady source of $(item)ender pearls$() — for Eyes of Ender and the Return Portal Seed.
